zh.Whitewell, Durham: 愛爾蘭庫迪 維斯特亞斯特維爾
zh.of Cotton, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可科頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Millott於1496年出生在英國藍卡爾盧福德時，她的父親Lord Ralph Millot23歲，母親Isabel Eure34歲。她於1518年與Thomas Thurburn Blakiston在英國英格蘭達勒姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1553年10月1日在英國達勒姆達勒姆享年57歲。

zh-hans.of Cotton, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可科頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Millott于1496年出生在英国藍卡爾盧福德时，她的父亲Lord Ralph Millot23岁，母亲Isabel Eure34岁。她于1518年与Thomas Thurburn Blakiston在英国英格兰達勒姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1553年10月1日在英国達勒姆達勒姆享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Millott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Tipperary, Galway and Mayo): from Míolóid or its variant Méalóid, a byname based on Latin miles, militis ‘soldier’.

variants.name: Mellett
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Millett  .
Altered form of French Melet: probably a derivative of Mele ‘medlar’. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Mellette .

variants.name: Millet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Leonce, Aime, Aubert, Celine, Herve, Julien, Leandre, Marcel, Monique, Patrice, Raymonde, Roussel.

French and Catalan: metonymic occupational name for a grower or seller of millet or panic grass, or a topographic name for someone who lived by a field of millet, from French and Catalan millet (from Latin milietum, a derivative of milium, in Old French mil ‘millet’).
French: habitational name from (Le) Millet, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Mill
meanings: Scottish and English: topographic name for someone who lived near a mill, from Middle English mille, melle, mulle ‘mill’ (assimilated forms of Old English mylen). It was usually in effect an occupational name for a worker at a mill or for the miller himself. The mill, whether powered by water, wind, or (occasionally) animals, was an important center in every medieval settlement; it was normally operated by an agent of the local landowner, and individual peasants were compelled to come to him to have their grain ground into flour, a proportion of the ground grain being kept by the miller by way of payment.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Mill, a short form of Millicent (compare Millett ) or perhaps from a variant of the Middle English male personal name Mile (see Miles ).
Dutch (Van Mill): habitational name from Mill in North Brabant.

variants.name: Mellott
meanings: Variant of   Marlette  , a surname of French origin (see   Merlet  ). Compare   Mallott   and   Melott  .

variants.name: Mylott
meanings: English (Lancashire) and Irish: variant of   Millett  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Millott was born in 1496, in Rufford, Lancashire, England, her father, Lord Ralph Millot, was 23 and her mother, Isabel Eure, was 34. She married Thomas Thurburn Blakiston in 1518, in Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 1 October 1553, in Durham, Durham, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Millott est née en 1496, à Rufford, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Ralph Millot, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabel Eure, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Thurburn Blakiston en 1518, à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 1 octobre 1553, à Durham, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Millott 1496 in Rufford, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Ralph Millot 23 und ihre Mutter Isabel Eure 34. Sie hat 1518 in Durham, England, United Kingdom Thomas Thurburn Blakiston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 1. Oktober 1553 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Durham, Durham, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Millott è nata il nel 1496 nel Rufford, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Lord Ralph Millot, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Isabel Eure, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Thurburn Blakiston nel 1518, nel Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 1 ottobre 1553, nel Durham, Durham, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Millott(이)가 1496년 영국 랭카실르 루퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Ralph Millot(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Eure(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1518년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람에서 Thomas Thurburn Blakiston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1553년 10월 1일 영국 뒤람 뒤람에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Millott nasceu em 1496, em Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Ralph Millot, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Eure, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Thurburn Blakiston em 1518, em Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1 de outubro de 1553, em Durham, Durham, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Millott родилась в 1496 г. в местности руффорд, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Ralph Millot было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Eure, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Thurburn Blakiston в 1518 г. в местности дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 1 октября 1553 г. в местности дурам, дурам, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Millott nació en 1496, en Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Ralph Millot, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Isabel Eure, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Thomas Thurburn Blakiston en 1518, en Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 1 de octubre de 1553, en Durham, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
